plan.description: Turn a backlog item or feature request into a small plan.

investigate.description: Triage a bug read-only before changing code.

implement.description: Implement a feature with review and checks.

fix.description: Fix a bug using optional investigation notes.

review.description: Review a pasted diff, PR summary, or proposed change.

goal.description: Draft and refine a goal contract until a structured judge marks it ready.
